title: Probability-Based Learning Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of using probability and Bayes' Theorem to update beliefs and make predictions from data.
relationships: Prior belief is combined with observed data likelihood using Bayes' Theorem (P(H|D) = [P(D|H) * P(H)] / P(D)) to calculate the posterior belief, which then informs a prediction and becomes the new prior for the next iteration of learning.
